title: Zisteau Pigmen
description: Zombified Piglins named "Zisteau" become Zombie Pigmen.
body:
<center>
  
![image](https://i.postimg.cc/3JBPJL9L/Zisteau-Pigmen-Header.png)

A Minecraft resource pack that changes adult Zombified Piglins named "Zisteau" into Zombie Pigmen.

</center>

## Overview

In reference to the [former Minecraft YouTuber](https://www.youtube.com/Zisteau) and [Etho's EthoCorp cashier](https://youtu.be/FB5C3L-5SkQ?si=38H1MS752CP7OlIG&t=637) of the same name, adult Zombified Piglins named "Zisteau" will change into Zombie Pigmen.

<center>

![image](https://i.postimg.cc/L50LxF23/8MOar-SS.png)

</center>

**This resource pack requires OptiFine or a CEM alternative such as [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** and may conflict with other resource packs or mods that alter Zombified Piglin textures.

## Versions

| Minecraft Version | Pack Version
| :--: | :--: |
| 1.21.9 - 26.2 | [v2.3.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/zisteau_pigmen/version/v2.3.0)
| 1.21 - 1.21.8 | [v1.1.2](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/zisteau_pigmen/version/v1.1.2)

Older versions can be found [here on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/zisteau-pigmen/versions).

## Bug Reports
Found a bug? Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/vZJSDjPcmu) and open a ticket.

## Icon Credit (v1.0.0 - v2.2.0)
The pack icon used from v1.0.0 to v2.2.0 is from [Zisteau's YouTube channel in 2020](https://web.archive.org/web/20200104045132/https://www.youtube.com/user/Zisteau). All credit goes to the original artist.
